text.DRV: 5:17 All these were numbered in the days of Joathan the king of Juda, and in the days of Jeroboam the king of Israel.

text.NRSV: The Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh had valiant warriors, who carried shield and sword, and drew the bow, expert in war, forty-four thousand seven hundred sixty, ready for service.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Reuben and Gad, and half tribe of Manasseh, of the sons of valour, men bearing shield and sword and bending the bow, and instructed in war, were forty-four thousand and seven hundred and sixty, ready to go forth in the host.
text.KJV: 5:18 ¶ The sonnes of Reuben, and the Gadites, and halfe the tribe of Manasseh, of valiant men, men able to beare buckler and sword, and to shoote with bow, and skilfull in warre, were foure and fourtie thousand, seuen hundred and threescore, that went out to the warre.
text.DRV: 5:18 The children of Ruben, and of Gad, and the half tribe of Manasses, men of war, carrying shields, and swords, and bending the bow, and taught to battles, four and forty thousand and seven hundred threescore going forth to fight.

text.NRSV: They made war on the Hagrites, Jetur, Naphish, and Nodab;
text.Rotherham: So they made war with the Hagrites,—and Jetur and Naphish, and Nodab;
text.KJV: 5:19 And they made warre with the Hagarites, with Ietur, and Nephish, and Nodab.
text.DRV: 5:19 They fought against the Agarenes, but the Itureians, and Naphis, and Nodab

text.NRSV: and when they received help against them, the Hagrites and all who were with them were delivered into their hands, for they cried to God in the battle, and he granted their entreaty because they trusted in him.
text.Rotherham: and were helped against them, and the Hagrites and all that were with them were delivered into their hand,—for, unto God, made they outcry, in the war, and he suffered himself to be entreated by them, because they put their trust in him;
text.KJV: 5:20 And they were helped against them, and the Hagarites were deliuered into their hand, and all that were with them: for they cried to God in the battell, and he was intreated of them, because they put their trust in him.
text.DRV: 5:20 gave them aid. And the Agarenes were delivered into their hands, and all that were with them, because they called upon God when they fought: and he heard them, because they believed in him.

text.NRSV: They captured their livestock: fifty thousand of their camels, two hundred fifty thousand sheep, two thousand donkeys, and one hundred thousand captives.
text.Rotherham: and they captured their cattle—their camels, fifty thousand, and, flocks, two hundred and fifty thousand, and, asses, two thousand,—and, persons of men, a hundred thousand;
text.KJV: 5:21 And they tooke away their cattell: of their camels fiftie thousand, and of sheepe two hundred and fiftie thousand, and of asses two thousand, and of men an hundred thousand.
text.DRV: 5:21 And they took all that they possessed, Camels fifty thousand, and sheep two hundred fifty thousand, and asses two thousand, and of men an hundred thousand souls.

text.NRSV: Many were slain, because the war was of God. And they lived in their territory until the exile.
text.Rotherham: for, many slain, fell, for, of God, was the war,—and they dwelt in their stead, until the captivity.
text.KJV: 5:22 For there fell downe many slaine, because the warre was of God. And they dwelt in their steads vntil the captiuity.
text.DRV: 5:22 And many fell down wounded: for it was the battle of our Lord. And they dwelt for them until the transmigration.

text.NRSV: The members of the half-tribe of Manasseh lived in the land; they were very numerous from Bashan to Baal-hermon, Senir, and Mount Hermon.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of the half tribe of Manasseh, dwelt in the land,—from Bashan, as far as to Baal-hermon and Senir and Mount Hermon, they, were multiplied.
text.KJV: 5:23 ¶ And the children of the halfe tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the lande: they increased from Bashan vnto Baal-hermon, and Senir, and vnto mount Hermon.
text.DRV: 5:23 Also the children of the half tribe of Manasses possessed the land, from the coasts of Basan unto Baal, Hermon, and Sanir, & mount Hermon, for the number was great.

text.NRSV: These were the heads of their ancestral houses: Epher, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty warriors, famous men, heads of their ancestral houses.
text.Rotherham: And, these, were the heads of their ancestral house,—Epher and Ishi and Eliel and Azriel and Jeremiah and Hodaviah and Jahdiel, men who were heroes of valour, men of renown, chiefs to their ancestral house.
text.KJV: 5:24 And these were the heads of the house of their fathers, euen Epher, and Ishi, & Eliel, and Azriel, and Ieremiah, and Hodauiah, and Iahdiel, mightie men of valour, famous men, & heads of the house of their fathers.
text.DRV: 5:24 And these were the Princes of the house of their kindred, Epher, & Jesi, and Eliel, & Esriel, and Jeremia, and Odoia, and Jediel, most valiant men and mighty, & renowned Princes in their families.

text.NRSV: But they were unfaithful to the God of their ancestors, and prostituted themselves to the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God had destroyed before them.
text.Rotherham: But they dealt unfaithfully with the God of their fathers,—and went unchastely after the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God destroyed from before them;
text.KJV: 5:25 ¶ And they transgressed against the God of their fathers, and went a whoring after the Gods of the people of the land, whome God destroyed before them.
text.DRV: 5:25 But they forsook the God of their fathers, and fornicated after the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God took away before them.

text.NRSV: So the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of King Pul of Assyria, the spirit of King Tilgath-pilneser of Assyria, and he carried them away, namely, the Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, and brought them to Halah, Habor, Hara, and the river Gozan, to this day.
text.Rotherham: so the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria, and he took them away captive, even the Reubenites and the Gadites and the half tribe of Manasseh,—and brought them in unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river of Gozan, unto this day.
text.KJV: 5:26 And the God of Israel stirred vp the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tilgath-pilneser king of Assyria, and he caried them away (euen the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the halfe tribe of Manasseh:) & brought them vnto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the riuer Gozan, vnto this day.
text.DRV: 5:26 And the God of Israel raised up the spirit of Phul king of the Assyrians, and the spirit of Thelgathphalnasar king of Assur: and he transported Ruben, and Gad, and the half tribe of Manasses, and brought them into Lahela, and into Habor, and to Ara, and to the river of Gozan, until this day.

text.NRSV: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Levi, Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.
text.KJV: 6:1 The sonnes of Leui: Gershon, Kohath & Merari.
text.DRV: 6:1 The sons of Levi: Gerson, Caath, and Merari.

text.NRSV: The sons of Kohath: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Kohath, Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
text.KJV: 6:2 And the sonnes of Kohath: Amram, Izahar, & Hebron, & Uzziel.
text.DRV: 6:2 The sons of Caath: Amram, Isaar, Hebron, and Oziel.

text.NRSV: The children of Amram: Aaron, Moses, and Miriam. The sons of Aaron: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
text.Rotherham: And, the children of Amram, Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam,—and, the sons of Aaron, Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
text.KJV: 6:3 And the children of Amram: Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. The sonnes also of Aaron: Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
text.DRV: 6:3 The children of Amram: Aaron, Moyses, and Maria. The sons of Aaron: Nadab and Abiu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

text.NRSV: Eleazar became the father of Phinehas, Phinehas became the father of Abishua,
text.Rotherham: Eleazar, begat Phinehas, Phinehas, begat Abishua;
text.KJV: 6:4 ¶ Eleazar begate Phinehas, Phinehas begate Abishua.
text.DRV: 6:4 Eleazar begat Phinees, and Phinees begat Abisue,

text.NRSV: Abishua became the father of Bukki, Bukki became the father of Uzzi,
text.Rotherham: and, Abishua, begat Bukki, and, Bukki, begat Uzzi;
text.KJV: 6:5 And Abishua begate Bukki, and Bukki begate Uzzi,
text.DRV: 6:5 and Abisue begat Bocci, and Bocci begat Ozi.

text.NRSV: Uzzi became the father of Zerahiah, Zerahiah became the father of Meraioth,
text.Rotherham: and, Uzzi, begat Zerahiah, and, Zerahiah, begat Meraioth;
text.KJV: 6:6 And Uzzi begate Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begate Meraioth,
text.DRV: 6:6 Ozi begat Zaraias, and Zaraias begat Maraioth.

text.NRSV: Meraioth became the father of Amariah, Amariah became the father of Ahitub,
text.Rotherham: Meraioth, begat Amariah, and, Amariah, begat Ahitub;
text.KJV: 6:7 Meraioth begate Amariah, and Amariah begate Ahitub,
text.DRV: 6:7 Moreover Meraioth begat Amarias, and Amarias begat Achitob.

text.NRSV: Ahitub became the father of Zadok, Zadok became the father of Ahimaaz,
text.Rotherham: and, Ahitub, begat Zadok, and, Zadok, begat Ahimaaz;
text.KJV: 6:8 And Ahitub begate Zadok, and Zadok begate Ahimaaz,
text.DRV: 6:8 Achitob begat Sadoc, and Sadoc begat Achimaas,

text.NRSV: Ahimaaz became the father of Azariah, Azariah became the father of Johanan,
text.Rotherham: and, Ahimaaz, begat Azariah, and, Azariah, begat Johanan,
text.KJV: 6:9 And Ahimaaz begate Azariah, and Azariah begate Iohanan,
text.DRV: 6:9 Achimaas begat Azarias, Azarias begat Johanan,

text.NRSV: and Johanan became the father of Azariah (it was he who served as priest in the house that Solomon built in Jerusalem).
text.Rotherham: and, Johanan, begat Azariah,—he, it was who ministered as priest, in the house which Solomon built in Jerusalem;
text.KJV: 6:10 And Iohanan begate Azariah, (hee it is that executed the Priests office, in the temple that Solomon built in Ierusalem)
text.DRV: 6:10 Johanan begat Azarias. The same is he that executed the priestly office in the house, which Salomon built in Jerusalem.

text.NRSV: Azariah became the father of Amariah, Amariah became the father of Ahitub,
text.Rotherham: and Azariah begat Amariah,—and, Amariah, begat Ahitub;
text.KJV: 6:11 And Azariah begate Amariah, and Amariah begate Ahitub,
text.DRV: 6:11 And Azarias begat Amarias, and Amarias begat Achitob,

text.NRSV: Ahitub became the father of Zadok, Zadok became the father of Shallum,
text.Rotherham: and, Ahitub, begat Zadok, and, Zadok, begat Shallum;
text.KJV: 6:12 And Ahitub begate Zadok, and Zadok begate Shallum,
text.DRV: 6:12 and Achitob begat Sadoc, and Sadoc begat Sellum,

text.NRSV: Shallum became the father of Hilkiah, Hilkiah became the father of Azariah,
text.Rotherham: and, Shallum, begat Hilkiah, and Hilkiah, begat Azariah;
text.KJV: 6:13 And Shallum begate Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begate Azariah,
text.DRV: 6:13 Sellum begat Helcias, and Helcias begat Azarias,

text.NRSV: Azariah became the father of Seraiah, Seraiah became the father of Jehozadak;
text.Rotherham: and, Azariah, begat Seraiah, and, Seraiah, begat Jehozadak;
text.KJV: 6:14 And Azariah begate Seraiah, and Seraiah begate Iehozadak,
text.DRV: 6:14 Azarias begat Saraias, & Saraias begat Josedec.

text.NRSV: and Jehozadak went into exile when the Lord sent Judah and Jerusalem into exile by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.
text.Rotherham: and, Jehozadak, departed, when Yahweh carried away Judah and Jerusalem into captivity,—by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.
text.KJV: 6:15 And Iehozadak went into captiuitie, when the Lord caried away Iudah and Ierusalem by the hand of Nebuchad-nezzar.
text.DRV: 6:15 Moreover Josedec went forth, when our Lord transported Juda and Jerusalem by the hands of Nabuchodonosor.

text.NRSV: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Levi, Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.
text.KJV: 6:16 ¶ The sonnes of Leui: Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.
text.DRV: 6:16 The sons then of Levi: Gerson, Caath, and Merari.

text.NRSV: These are the names of the sons of Gershom: Libni and Shimei.
text.Rotherham: And, these, are the names of the sons of Gershom, Libni and Shimei.
text.KJV: 6:17 And these be the names of the sonnes of Gershom: Libni, & Shimei.
text.DRV: 6:17 And these be the names of the sons of Gerson: Lobni and Semei.

text.NRSV: The sons of Kohath: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Kohath, were Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
text.KJV: 6:18 And the sonnes of Kohath were: Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
text.DRV: 6:18 The sons of Caath: Amram, and Isaar, and Hebron, and Oziel.

text.NRSV: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to their ancestral houses.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Merari, Mahli and Mushi. And, these, are the families of Levi by their fathers:
text.KJV: 6:19 The sonnes of Merari: Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Leuites, according to their fathers.
text.DRV: 6:19 The sons of Merari: Moholi and Musi. And these are the kindreds of Levi according to their families.

text.NRSV: Of Gershom: Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,
text.Rotherham: To Gershom, pertained Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,
text.KJV: 6:20 Of Gershom: Libni his sonne, Iahath his sonne, Zimmah his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:20 Gerson, Lobni his son, Jahath his son, Zamma his son,

text.NRSV: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeatherai his son.
text.Rotherham: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeatherai his son.
text.KJV: 6:21 Ioah his sonne, Iddo his sonne, Zerah his sonne, Ieaterai his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:21 Joah his son, Addo his son, Zara his son, Jethrai his son.

text.NRSV: The sons of Kohath: Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,
text.Rotherham: The sons of Kohath, Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son;
text.KJV: 6:22 The sonnes of Kohath: Amminadab his sonne, Korah his sonne, Assir his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:22 The sons of Caath, Aminadab his son, Core his son, Asir his son,

text.NRSV: Elkanah his son, Ebiasaph his son, Assir his son,
text.Rotherham: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son;
text.KJV: 6:23 Elkanah his sonne, and Ebiasaph his sonne, and Assir his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:23 Elcana his son, Abiasaph his son, Asir his son.

text.NRSV: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.
text.Rotherham: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.
text.KJV: 6:24 Tahath his sonne, Uriel his sonne, Uzziah his sonne, and Shaul his sonne.
text.DRV: 6:24 Thahath his son, Uriel his son, Ozias his son, Saul his son.

text.NRSV: The sons of Elkanah: Amasai and Ahimoth,
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Elkanah, Amasai, and Ahimoth.
text.KJV: 6:25 And the sonnes of Elkanah: Amasai, and Ahimoth.
text.DRV: 6:25 The sons of Elcana: Amasai, and Achimoth,

text.NRSV: Elkanah his son, Zophai his son, Nahath his son,
text.Rotherham: As for Elkanah, the sons of Elkanah, Zophai his son, and Nahath his son;
text.KJV: 6:26 As for Elkanah: the sonnes of Elkanah, Zophai his sonne, and Nahath his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:26 & Elcana: The sons of Elcana: Sophai his son, Nahath his son,

text.NRSV: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.
text.Rotherham: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.
text.KJV: 6:27 Eliab his sonne, Ieroham his sonne, Elkanah his sonne.
text.DRV: 6:27 Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elcana his son.

text.NRSV: The sons of Samuel: Joel his firstborn, the second Abijah.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Samuel, the firstborn, [Joel], and, the second, Abiah.
text.KJV: 6:28 And the sonnes of Samuel: the first borne Uashni, and Abiah.
text.DRV: 6:28 The sons of Samuel: the first-begotten Vasseni, and Abia.

text.NRSV: The sons of Merari: Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzzah his son,
text.Rotherham: the sons of Merari, Mahli,—Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzzah his son;
text.KJV: 6:29 The sonnes of Merari: Mahli, Libni his sonne, Shimei his sonne, Uzza his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:29 And the sons of Merari, Moholi: Lobni his son, Semei his son, Oza his son,

text.NRSV: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, and Asaiah his son.
text.Rotherham: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.
text.KJV: 6:30 Shimea his sonne, Haggiah his sonne, Asaiah his sonne.
text.DRV: 6:30 Sammaa his son, Haggia his son, Asaia his son.

text.NRSV: These are the men whom David put in charge of the service of song in the house of the Lord, after the ark rested there.
text.Rotherham: And, these, are they whom David caused to stand, as the servants of song, in the house of Yahweh, when he had given rest unto the ark;
text.KJV: 6:31 And these are they, whom Dauid set ouer the seruice of song in the house of the Lord, after that the Arke had rest.
text.DRV: 6:31 These are they, whom David appointed over the singing men of the house of our Lord, since the Ark was placed:

text.NRSV: They ministered with song before the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, until Solomon had built the house of the Lord in Jerusalem; and they performed their service in due order.
text.Rotherham: so they became attendants before the habitation of the tent of meeting, with song, until Solomon built the house of Yahweh, in Jerusalem,—and they took their stand according to their prescribed manner over their work.
text.KJV: 6:32 And they ministred before the dwelling place of the Tabernacle of the Congregation, with singing, vntill Solomon had built the house of the Lord in Ierusalem: and then they waited on their office, according to their order.
text.DRV: 6:32 & they ministered before the tabernacle of testimony, singing, until Salomon built the house of our Lord in Jerusalem: & they stood according to their order in the ministry.

text.NRSV: These are the men who served; and their sons: Of the Kohathites: Heman, the singer, son of Joel, son of Samuel,
text.Rotherham: Yea, these, are they who stood, with their sons. Of the sons of the Kohathites, Heman the singer, son of Joel, son of Samuel,
text.KJV: 6:33 And these are they that waited with their children of the sonnes of the Kohathites, Heman a singer: the sonne of Ioel, the sonne of Shemuel,
text.DRV: 6:33 And these are they, which assisted with their sons, of the sons of Caath, Hemam singing man, the son of Joel, the son of Samuel,

text.NRSV: son of Elkanah, son of Jeroham, son of Eliel, son of Toah,
text.Rotherham: son of Elkanah, son of Jeroham, son of Eliel, son of Toah,—
text.KJV: 6:34 The sonne of Elkanah, the sonne of Ieroham, the sonne of Eliel, the sonne of Toah,
text.DRV: 6:34 the son of Elcana, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Thohu,

text.NRSV: son of Zuph, son of Elkanah, son of Mahath, son of Amasai,
text.Rotherham: son of Zuph, son of Elkanah, son of Mahath, son of Amasai:—
text.KJV: 6:35 The sonne of Zuph, the sonne of Elkanah, the sonne of Mahath, the sonne of Amasai,
text.DRV: 6:35 the son of Suph, the son of Elcana, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

text.NRSV: son of Elkanah, son of Joel, son of Azariah, son of Zephaniah,
text.Rotherham: son of Elkanah, son of Joel, son of Azariah, son of Zephaniah,—
text.KJV: 6:36 The sonne of Elkanah, the sonne of Ioel, the sonne of Azariah, the sonne of Zephaniah,
text.DRV: 6:36 the son of Elcana, the son of Johel, the son of Azaria, the son of Sophonias,

text.NRSV: son of Tahath, son of Assir, son of Ebiasaph, son of Korah,
text.Rotherham: son of Tahath, son of Assir, son of Ebiasaph, son of Korah;—
text.KJV: 6:37 The sonne of Tahath, the sonne of Assir, the sonne of Ebiasaph, the sonne of Korah,
text.DRV: 6:37 the son of Thahath, the son of Asir, the son of Abiasaph, the son of Core,

text.NRSV: son of Izhar, son of Kohath, son of Levi, son of Israel;
text.Rotherham: son of Izhar, son of Kohath, son of Levi, son of Israel.
text.KJV: 6:38 The sonne of Izhar, the sonne of Kohath, the sonne of Leui, the sonne of Israel.
text.DRV: 6:38 the son of Isaar, the son of Caath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

text.NRSV: and his brother Asaph, who stood on his right, namely, Asaph son of Berechiah, son of Shimea,
text.Rotherham: And, his brother Asaph who stood on his right hand, Asaph son of Berechiah, son of Shimea,—
text.KJV: 6:39 And his brother Asaph (who stood on his right hand) euen Asaph the sonne of Berachiah, the sonne of Shimea,
text.DRV: 6:39 And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, Asaph the son of Barachias, the son of Samaa,

text.NRSV: son of Michael, son of Baaseiah, son of Malchijah,
text.Rotherham: son of Michael, son of Baaseiah, son of Malchijah,—
text.KJV: 6:40 The sonne of Michael, the sonne of Baasiah, the sonne of Melchiah,
text.DRV: 6:40 the son of Michael, the son of Basaia, the son of Melchia.

text.NRSV: son of Ethni, son of Zerah, son of Adaiah,
text.Rotherham: son of Ethni, son of Zerah, son of Adaiah;—
text.KJV: 6:41 The sonne of Ethni, the sonne of Zerah, the sonne of Adaiah,
text.DRV: 6:41 the son of Athanai, the son of Zara, the son of Adaia,

text.NRSV: son of Ethan, son of Zimmah, son of Shimei,
text.Rotherham: son of Ethan, son of Zimmah, son of Shimei,—
text.KJV: 6:42 The sonne of Ethan, the sonne of Zimmah, the sonne of Shimei,
text.DRV: 6:42 the son of Ethan, the son of Zamma, the son of Semei.

text.NRSV: son of Jahath, son of Gershom, son of Levi.
text.Rotherham: son of Jahath, son of Gershom, son of Levi.
text.KJV: 6:43 The sonne of Iahath, the sonne of Gershom, the sonne of Leui.
text.DRV: 6:43 the son of Jeth, the son of Gerson, the son of Levi.

text.NRSV: On their left were their kindred the sons of Merari: Ethan son of Kishi, son of Abdi, son of Malluch,
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Merari, their brethren, on the left hand, Ethan son of Kishi, son of Abdi, son of Malluch;—
text.KJV: 6:44 And their brethren the sonnes of Merari, stood on the left hand: Ethan the sonne of Kishi, the sonne of Abdi, the sonne of Malluch,
text.DRV: 6:44 And the children of Merari their brethren, on the left hand, Ethan the son of Cusi, the son of Abdi, the son of Maloch,

text.NRSV: son of Hashabiah, son of Amaziah, son of Hilkiah,
text.Rotherham: son of Hashabiah, son of Amaziah, son of Hilkiah,—
text.KJV: 6:45 The sonne of Hashabiah, the sonne of Amaziah, the sonne of Hilkiah,
text.DRV: 6:45 the son of Hasabia, the son of Amasia, the son of Helcias,

text.NRSV: son of Amzi, son of Bani, son of Shemer,
text.Rotherham: son of Amzi, son of Bani, son of Shemer;—
text.KJV: 6:46 The sonne of Amzi, the sonne of Bani, the sonne of Shamer,
text.DRV: 6:46 the son of Amasai, the son of Boni, the son of Somer,

text.NRSV: son of Mahli, son of Mushi, son of Merari, son of Levi;
text.Rotherham: son of Mahli, son of Mushi, son of Merari, son of Levi.
text.KJV: 6:47 The sonne of Mahli, the sonne of Mushi, the sonne of Merari, the sonne of Leui.
text.DRV: 6:47 the son of Moholi, the son of Musi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

text.NRSV: and their kindred the Levites were appointed for all the service of the tabernacle of the house of God.
text.Rotherham: Howbeit, their brethren, the Levites, were given, for all the work of the habitation, of the house of God.
text.KJV: 6:48 Their brethren also the Leuits were appointed vnto all maner of seruice of the Tabernacle of the house of God.
text.DRV: 6:48 Their brethren also the Levites, which were ordained for all the ministry of the tabernacle of the house of our Lord.

text.NRSV: But Aaron and his sons made offerings on the altar of burnt offering and on the altar of incense, performing all the work of the most holy place, to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.
text.Rotherham: But, Aaron and his sons, were to make perfume upon the altar of ascending-sacrifice, and upon the altar of incense, according to all the service of the holy of holies,—even for putting a propitiatory-covering over Israel, according go all that, Moses, the servant of God, commanded.
text.KJV: 6:49 ¶ But Aaron, and his sonnes offered vpon the altar of the burnt offering, and on the altar of incense, and were appointed for all the worke of the place most holy, and to make an atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the seruant of God had commaunded.
text.DRV: 6:49 But Aaron, and his sons burnt incense upon the altar of holocaust, and upon the altar of incense, for every work of Sancta Sanctorum: and to pray for Israel according to all things, which Moyses the servant of God commanded.

text.NRSV: These are the sons of Aaron: Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,
text.Rotherham: And, these, are the sons of Aaron,—Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,—
text.KJV: 6:50 And these are the sonnes of Aaron: Eleazar his sonne, Phinehas his sonne, Abishua his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:50 And these are the sons of Aaron: Eleazar his son, Phinees his son, Abisue his son.

text.NRSV: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,
text.Rotherham: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,—
text.KJV: 6:51 Bukki his sonne, Uzzi his sonne, Zerahiah his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:51 Bocci his son, Ozi his son, Zarahia his son,

text.NRSV: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,
text.Rotherham: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,—
text.KJV: 6:52 Meraioth his sonne, Amariah his sonne, Ahitub his sonne,
text.DRV: 6:52 Meraioth his son, Amarias his son, Achitob his son,

text.NRSV: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.
text.Rotherham: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.
text.KJV: 6:53 Zadok his sonne, Ahimaaz his sonne.
text.DRV: 6:53 Sadoc his son, Achimaas his son.

text.NRSV: These are their dwelling places according to their settlements within their borders: to the sons of Aaron of the families of Kohathites—for the lot fell to them first—
text.Rotherham: And, these, are their dwelling-places, according to their encampments, in their boundary,—pertaining to the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites, for, theirs, was the lot:
text.KJV: 6:54 ¶ Now these are their dwelling places, throughout their castels in their coasts, of the sonnes of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites: for theirs was the lot.
text.DRV: 6:54 And these are their habitations by the towns and confines, to wit, of the sons of Aaron, according to the kindreds of the Caathites: for they were fallen to them by lot.

text.NRSV: to them they gave Hebron in the land of Judah and its surrounding pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: so they gave them Hebron, in the land of Judah, and the pasture lands thereof, round about it;
text.KJV: 6:55 And they gaue them Hebron in the land of Iudah, and the suburbes thereof round about it.
text.DRV: 6:55 They gave therefore to them Hebron in the Land of Juda, and the suburbs thereof round about:

text.NRSV: but the fields of the city and its villages they gave to Caleb son of Jephunneh.
text.Rotherham: but, the field-land of the city, and the villages thereof, gave they to Caleb son of Jephunneh.
text.KJV: 6:56 But the fields of the citie, and the villages thereof, they gaue to Caleb the sonne of Iephunneh.
text.DRV: 6:56 but the fields of the city, and the towns to Caleb the son of Jephone.

text.NRSV: To the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of refuge: Hebron, Libnah with its pasture lands, Jattir, Eshtemoa with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: And, to the sons of Aaron, gave they, the cities of refuge—Hebron, and Libnah, with her pasture lands,—and Jattir and Eshtemoa, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:57 And to the sonnes of Aaron they gaue the cities of Iudah, namely Hebron the citie of refuge, and Libna with her suburbes, and Iattir and Eshtemoa, with their suburbes,
text.DRV: 6:57 Moreover to the sons of Aaron they gave cities, to fly unto, Hebron, and Lobna, and the suburbs thereof,

text.NRSV: Hilen with its pasture lands, Debir with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: and Hilen with her pasture lands, Debir, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:58 And Hilen with her suburbes, Debir with her suburbes,
text.DRV: 6:58 Jether also and Esthemo with the suburbs thereof, yea and Helon, and Dabir with their suburbs:

text.NRSV: Ashan with its pasture lands, and Beth-shemesh with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: and Ashan, with her pasture lands, and Bethshemesh, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:59 And Ashan with her suburbes, and Beth-shemesh with her suburbes.
text.DRV: 6:59 Asan also and Bethsemes, & their suburbs.

text.NRSV: From the tribe of Benjamin, Geba with its pasture lands, Alemeth with its pasture lands, and Anathoth with its pasture lands. All their towns throughout their families were thirteen.
text.Rotherham: and, out of the tribe of Benjamin, Geba, with her pasture lands, and Allemeth, with her pasture lands,—and Anathoth, with her pasture lands;—all their cities, were thirteen cities, throughout their families.
text.KJV: 6:60 And out of the tribe of Beniamin, Geba with her suburbes, and Alemeth with her suburbes, Anathoth with her suburbes. All their cities throughout their families were thirteene cities.
text.DRV: 6:60 And of the tribe of Benjamin: Gabee and the suburbs thereof, Almath with the suburbs thereof, Anothoth also with the suburbs thereof. All the cities, thirteen, by their kindreds.

text.NRSV: To the rest of the Kohathites were given by lot out of the family of the tribe, out of the half-tribe, the half of Manasseh, ten towns.
text.Rotherham: And, unto the rest of the sons of Kohath—of the families of the tribe of Ephraim and of the tribe of Dan, and of the half-tribe of Manasseh, by lot ten cities.
text.KJV: 6:61 And vnto the sonnes of Rohath, which were left of the family of that tribe, were cities giuen out of the halfe tribe, namely out of the halfe tribe of Manasseh, by lot, ten cities.
text.DRV: 6:61 And to the children of Caath the residue of their kindred they gave of the half tribe of Manasses in possession ten cities.

text.NRSV: To the Gershomites according to their families were given thirteen towns out of the tribes of Issachar, Asher, Naphtali, and Manasseh in Bashan.
text.Rotherham: And, to the sons of Gershom, by their families—out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.
text.KJV: 6:62 And to the sonnes of Gershom throughout their families, out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteene cities.
text.DRV: 6:62 Moreover to the children of Gerson by their kindreds of the tribe of Issachar, and of the tribe of Aser, and of the tribe of Nephthali, and of the tribe of Manasses in Basan, thirteen cities.

text.NRSV: To the Merarites according to their families were given by lot twelve towns out of the tribes of Reuben, Gad, and Zebulun.
text.Rotherham: And, unto sons of Merari, by their families—out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, by lot twelve cities.
text.KJV: 6:63 Unto the sonnes of Merari were giuen by lot, throughout their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelue cities.
text.DRV: 6:63 And to the sons of Merari by their kindreds of the tribe of Ruben, and of the tribe of Gad, & of the tribe of Zabulon, they gave by lot twelve cities.

text.NRSV: So the people of Israel gave the Levites the towns with their pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: So then the sons of Israel gave, to the Levites,—the cities and the pasture lands thereof;
text.KJV: 6:64 And the children of Israel gaue to the Leuites these cities, with their suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:64 Also the children of Israel gave to the Levites cities, and their suburbs:

text.NRSV: They also gave them by lot out of the tribes of Judah, Simeon, and Benjamin these towns that are mentioned by name.
text.Rotherham: yea they gave, by lot, out of the tribe of the sons of Judah, and out of the tribe of the sons of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the sons of Benjamin, these cities which are mentioned by name.
text.KJV: 6:65 And they gaue by lot, out of the tribe of the children of Iudah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Beniamin, these cities, which are called by their names.
text.DRV: 6:65 and they gave by lot, of the tribe of the children of Juda, and of the tribe of the children of Simeon, & of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities, which they called by their names,

text.NRSV: And some of the families of the sons of Kohath had towns of their territory out of the tribe of Ephraim.
text.Rotherham: But, as for some of the families of the sons of Kohath, they had the cities of their lot, out of the tribe of Ephraim;
text.KJV: 6:66 And the residue of the families of the sonnes of Kohath, had cities of their coasts, out of the tribe of Ephraim.
text.DRV: 6:66 and to them, that were of the kindred of the sons of Caath, & the cities in their borders were of the tribe of Ephraim.

text.NRSV: They were given the cities of refuge: Shechem with its pasture lands in the hill country of Ephraim, Gezer with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: and they gave unto them the cities of refuge—Shechem and her pasture lands, in the hill country of Ephraim,—and Gezer, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:67 And they gaue vnto them of the cities of refuge, Shechem in mount Ephraim, with her suburbs: they gaue also Gezer with her suburbs,
text.DRV: 6:67 They therefore gave them cities, to fly unto, Sichem with the suburbs thereof in mount Ephraim, and Gazer with the suburbs thereof,

text.NRSV: Jokmeam with its pasture lands, Beth-horon with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: and Jokmeam, with her pasture lands, and Beth-heron, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:68 And Iokmeam with her suburbs, & Beth-horon with her suburbs,
text.DRV: 6:68 Jecmaan also with the suburbs thereof, & Bethhoron in like manner,

text.NRSV: Aijalon with its pasture lands, Gath-rimmon with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: and Aijalon, with her pasture lands, and Gath-rimmon, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:69 And Aialon with her suburbs, and Gath-rimmon with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:69 moreover Helon also with the suburbs thereof, and Gethremmon in like manner.

text.NRSV: And out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Aner with its pasture lands, and Bileam with its pasture lands, for the rest of the families of the Kohathites.
text.Rotherham: and, out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Aner, with her pasture lands, and Bileam, with her pasture lands,—for the rest of the family of the sons of Kohath.
text.KJV: 6:70 And out of the halfe tribe of Manasseh, Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sonnes of Kohath.
text.DRV: 6:70 Moreover of the half tribe of Manasses Aner & the suburbs thereof, Balaam & the suburbs thereof: to wit, to them, which were left of the kindred of the sons of Caath.

text.NRSV: To the Gershomites: out of the half-tribe of Manasseh: Golan in Bashan with its pasture lands and Ashtaroth with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: Unto the sons of Gershom—out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan, with her pasture lands,—and Ashtaroth, with her pasture lands.
text.KJV: 6:71 Unto the sonnes of Gershom, were giuen out of the family of the halfe tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, and Ashtaroth with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:71 And to the sons of Gerson of the kindred of the half tribe of Manasses, Gaulon in Basan, & the suburbs thereof, & Astaroth with the suburbs thereof.

text.NRSV: Out of the tribe of Issachar: Kedesh with its pasture lands, Daberath with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: And, out of the tribe of Issachar, Kedesh, with her pasture lands,—Daberath, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:72 And out of the tribe of Issachar, Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,
text.DRV: 6:72 Of the tribe of Issachar, Cedes & the suburbs thereof, & Dabereth with the suburbs thereof,

text.NRSV: Ramoth with its pasture lands, and Anem with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: and Ramoth, with her pasture lands, and Anem, with her pasture lands.
text.KJV: 6:73 And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:73 Ramoth also & the suburbs thereof, & Anem with the suburbs thereof.

text.NRSV: Out of the tribe of Asher: Mashal with its pasture lands, Abdon with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: And, out of the tribe of Asher, Mashal, with her pasture lands,—and Abdon, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:74 And out of the tribe of Asher, Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,
text.DRV: 6:74 And of the tribe of Aser: Masal with the suburbs thereof, and Abdon in like manner,

text.NRSV: Hukok with its pasture lands, and Rehob with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: and Hukok, with her pasture lands,—and Rehob, with her pasture lands.
text.KJV: 6:75 And Hukok with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:75 Hucac also and the suburbs thereof, & Rohob with the suburbs thereof.

text.NRSV: Out of the tribe of Naphtali: Kedesh in Galilee with its pasture lands, Hammon with its pasture lands, and Kiriathaim with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: And, out of the tribe of Naphtali, Kedesh in Galilee, with her pasture lands, and Hammon, with her pasture lands,—and Kiryathaim, with her pasture lands.
text.KJV: 6:76 And out of the tribe of Naphtali, Kedesh in Galilee, with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kiriathaim with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:76 Moreover of the tribe of Nephthali, Cedes in Galilee and the suburbs thereof, Hamon with the suburbs thereof, and Cariathaim, and the suburbs thereof.

text.NRSV: To the rest of the Merarites: out of the tribe of Zebulun: Rimmono with its pasture lands, Tabor with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: Unto the rest of the sons of Merari—out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmono, with her pasture lands,—Tabor, with her pasture lands.
text.KJV: 6:77 Unto the rest of the children of Merari were giuen out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmon with her suburbs, Tabor with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:77 And to the rest of the sons of Merari: of the tribe of Zabulon Remmono and the suburbs thereof, and Thabor with the suburbs thereof:

text.NRSV: Across the Jordan from Jericho, on the east side of the Jordan, out of the tribe of Reuben: Bezer in the steppe with its pasture lands, Jahzah with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: And, beyond the Jordan at Jericho, on the east of the Jordan—out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness, with her pasture lands,—and Jahzah, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:78 And on the other side Iorden by Iericho, on the East side of Iorden,were giuen them out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wildernesse with her suburbs, & Iahzah with her suburbs,
text.DRV: 6:78 beyond Jordan also over against Jericho, against the East of Jordan, of the tribe of Ruben, Bosor in the wilderness with the suburbs thereof, and Jassa with the suburbs thereof,

text.NRSV: Kedemoth with its pasture lands, and Mephaath with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: and Kedemoth, with her pasture lands, and Mephaath, with her pasture lands.
text.KJV: 6:79 Kedemoth also with her suburbs, & Mephaath with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:79 Cademoth also and the suburbs thereof, and Mephaath with the suburbs thereof.

text.NRSV: And out of the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead with its pasture lands, Mahanaim with its pasture lands,
text.Rotherham: And, out of the tribe of Gad, Ramoth in Gilead, with her pasture lands,—and Mahanaim, with her pasture lands;
text.KJV: 6:80 And out of the tribe of Gad, Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, and Mahanaim with her suburbs,
text.DRV: 6:80 Moreover also of the tribe of Gad, Ramoth in Galaad and the suburbs thereof, and Manaim with the suburbs thereof,

text.NRSV: Heshbon with its pasture lands, and Jazer with its pasture lands.
text.Rotherham: and Heshbon, with her pasture lands, and Jazer, with her pasture lands.
text.KJV: 6:81 And Heshbon with her suburbs, and Iazer with her suburbs.
text.DRV: 6:81 Yea and Hesebon with the suburbs thereof, and Jezer with the suburbs thereof.

text.NRSV: The sons of Issachar: Tola, Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.
text.Rotherham: And, to the sons of Issachar, belonged, Tola and Push, Jashib and Shimron, four.
text.KJV: 7:1 Now the sonnes of Issachar were, Tola, and Puah, Iashub, and Shimron, foure.
text.DRV: 7:1 Moreover the sons of Issachar: Thola, and Phua, Jasub & Simeron, four,

text.NRSV: The sons of Tola: Uzzi, Rephaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their ancestral houses, namely of Tola, mighty warriors of their generations, their number in the days of David being twenty-two thousand six hundred.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Tola, were Uzzi and Rephaiah and Jeriel and Jahmai and Ibsam and Shemuel, chiefs of their ancestral house, pertaining to Tola, heroes of valour, in their generations,—their number, in the days of David, twenty-two thousand and six hundred.
text.KJV: 7:2 And the sonnes of Tola: Uzzi, and Rephaiah, and Ieriel, and Iahmai, and Iibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their fathers house, to wit, of Tola, they were valiant men of might in their generations, whose number was in the dayes of Dauid two and twentie thousand and sixe hundred.
text.DRV: 7:2 The sons of Thola: Ozi and Raphaia, and Jeriel, and Jemai, and Jebsem, and Samuel. Princes by the houses of their kindreds. Of the stock of Thola were numbered most valiant men in the days of David, two and twenty thousand six hundred.

text.NRSV: The son of Uzzi: Izrahiah. And the sons of Izrahiah: Michael, Obadiah, Joel, and Isshiah, five, all of them chiefs;
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Uzzi, Izrahiah,—and, the sons of Izrahiah, Michael and Obadiah and Joel, Isshiah—five, chiefs, all of them;
text.KJV: 7:3 And the sonnes of Uzzi, Izrahiah: and the sonnes of Izrahiah, Michael, and Obadiah, and Ioel, Ishiah, fiue: all of them chiefe men.
text.DRV: 7:3 The sons of Ozi: Izrahia, of whom were born Michael, and Obadia, and Joel, and Jesia, five, all Princes.

text.NRSV: and along with them, by their generations, according to their ancestral houses, were units of the fighting force, thirty-six thousand, for they had many wives and sons.
text.Rotherham: and, with them by their generations, pertaining to their ancestral house, were bands of a host for war, thirty-six thousand,—for they had many wives and sons;
text.KJV: 7:4 And with them, by their generations, after the house of their fathers, were bands of souldiers for warre, sixe and thirtie thousand men: for they had many wiues and sonnes.
text.DRV: 7:4 And with them by their families and peoples, ready girded to battle, most valiant men, six and thirty thousand: for they had many wives, and children.

text.NRSV: Their kindred belonging to all the families of Issachar were in all eighty-seven thousand mighty warriors, enrolled by genealogy.
text.Rotherham: and, their brethren, of all the families of Issachar, heroes of great valour, were eighty-seven thousand, when they had, all, registered themselves.
text.KJV: 7:5 And their brethren among all the families of Issachar, were men of might, reckoned in all by their genealogies, fourescore and seuen thousand.
text.DRV: 7:5 Their brethren also through all the kindred of Issachar, most strong to fight, were numbered four score and seven thousand.

text.NRSV: The sons of Benjamin: Bela, Becher, and Jediael, three.
text.Rotherham: Benjamin, Bela and Becher and Jediael, three.
text.KJV: 7:6 ¶ The sonnes of Beniamin: Bela, and Becher, and Iediael, three.
text.DRV: 7:6 The sons of Benjamin: Bela, and Bechor, and Jadihel, three.

text.NRSV: The sons of Bela: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, and Iri, five, heads of ancestral houses, mighty warriors; and their enrollment by genealogy was twenty-two thousand thirty-four.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Bela, Ezbon and Uzzi and Uzziel and Jerimoth and Iri, five, chiefs of the ancestral house, heroes of great valour,—who, when they had registered themselves, were twenty-two thousand and thirty-four,
text.KJV: 7:7 And the sonnes of Bela: Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Ierimoth, and Iri, fiue, heads of the house of their fathers, mightie men of valour, and were reckoned by their genealogies, twentie and two thousand, and thirtie and foure.
text.DRV: 7:7 The sons of Bela: Esbon, and Ozi, and Oziel, and Jerimoth, and Urai, five Princes of their families, and most strong to fight, and their number was twenty two thousand and thirty four.

text.NRSV: The sons of Becher: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these were the sons of Becher.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Becher, Zemirah and Joash and Eliezer and Elioenai and Omri, and Jeremoth and Abijah, and Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these, were sons of Becher.
text.KJV: 7:8 And the sonnes of Becher: Zemira, and Ioash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Ierimoth, and Abiah, and Anathoth, and Alameth. All these are the sonnes of Becher.
text.DRV: 7:8 Moreover the sons of Bechor: Zamira, and Joas, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Amri, and Jerimoth, and Abia, and Anathoth, and Almath. All these the sons of Bechor.

text.NRSV: Their enrollment by genealogy, according to their generations, as heads of their ancestral houses, mighty warriors, was twenty thousand two hundred.
text.Rotherham: And, when they had registered themselves by their generations, the chiefs of their ancestral house, the heroes of valour, were twenty thousand and two hundred.
text.KJV: 7:9 And the number of them, after their genealogie by their generations, heads of the house of their fathers, mightie men of valour, was twentie thousand and two hundred.
text.DRV: 7:9 And there were numbered by their families Princes of their kindreds most valiant unto battle, twenty thousand and two hundred.

text.NRSV: The son of Jediael: Bilhan. And the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Chenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, and Ahishahar.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jediael, Bilhan,—and, the sons of Bilhan, Jeish and Benjamin and Ehud and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tarshish, and Ahishahah.
text.KJV: 7:10 The sonnes also of Iediael, Bilhan: and the sonnes of Bilhan, Ieush, and Beniamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tharshish, and Ahishahar.
text.DRV: 7:10 Moreover the sons of Jadihel: Balan. And the sons of Balan: Jehus, and Benjamin, and Aod, and Chanana, and Zethan, and Tharsis, Ahisahar.

text.NRSV: All these were the sons of Jediael, according to the heads of their ancestral houses, mighty warriors, seventeen thousand two hundred, ready for service in war.
text.Rotherham: All these—sons of Jediael, by ancestral chiefs, heroes of great valour, were seventeen thousand and two hundred, ready to go forth as a host to war:—
text.KJV: 7:11 All these the sonnes of Iediael, by the heads of their fathers, mighty men of valour, were seuenteene thousand and two hundred souldiers, fit to goe out for warre and battaile.
text.DRV: 7:11 All these the sons of Jadihel, Princes of their kindreds, most valiant men, seventeen thousand, & two hundred going forth to battle.

text.NRSV: And Shuppim and Huppim were the sons of Ir, Hushim the son of Aher.
text.Rotherham: Shuppim also and Huppim, sons of Ir, Hushim sons of Aher.
text.KJV: 7:12 Shuppim also, and Huppim, the children of Ir, and Hushim, the sonnes of Aher.
text.DRV: 7:12 Sepham also, & Hapham, the sons of Hir: and Hasim the sons of Aher.

text.NRSV: The descendants of Naphtali: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer, and Shallum, the descendants of Bilhah.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Naphtali, Jahziel and Guni, and Jezer and Shallum, sons of Bilhah.
text.KJV: 7:13 ¶ The sonnes of Naphtali, Iahziel, and Guni, and Iezer, and Shallum, the sonnes of Bilhah.
text.DRV: 7:13 And the sons of Nephthali: Jasiel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Sellum, the sons of Bala.

text.NRSV: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his Aramean concubine bore; she bore Machir the father of Gilead.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Manasseh, Asriel, whom, [his wife] bare,—his concubine, the Syrian, bare Machir the father of Gilead;
text.KJV: 7:14 ¶ The sonnes of Manasseh: Ashriel, whom shee bare (but his concnbine the Aramitesse, bare Machir the father of Gilead.
text.DRV: 7:14 Moreover the son of Manasses, Ezriel: & his concubine the Syrian bare Machir the father of Galaad.

text.NRSV: And Machir took a wife for Huppim and for Shuppim. The name of his sister was Maacah. And the name of the second was Zelophehad; and Zelophehad had daughters.
text.Rotherham: and, Machir, took a wife pertaining to Huppim and Shuppim, and, the name of his sister, was Maacah, and, the name of the second, Zelophehad,—and, Zelophehad, had, daughters.
text.KJV: 7:15 And Machir tooke to wife the sister of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sisters name was Maachah) and the name of the second was Zelophehad: and Zelophehad had daughters.
text.DRV: 7:15 And Machir took wives for his sons Happhim, & Saphan: & he had a sister named Maacha: the name of the second Salphaad, and to Salphaad were born daughters.

text.NRSV: Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she named him Peresh; the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.
text.Rotherham: So then Maacah, wife of Machir, bare a son, and called his name Peresh, and, the name of his brother, was Sheresh,—and, his sons, were Ulam and Rakem;
text.KJV: 7:16 And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a sonne, and shee called his name Peresh, and the name of his brother was Sheresh, and his sonnes were Ulam and Rakem.
text.DRV: 7:16 And Maacha the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Phares: moreover the name of his brother, was Sares: and his sons, Ulam and Recen.

text.NRSV: The son of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead son of Machir, son of Manasseh.
text.Rotherham: and, the sons of Ulam, Bedan. These, were the sons of Gilead, son of Machir, son of Manasseh.
text.KJV: 7:17 And the sonnes of Ulam, Bedan. These were the sonnes of Gilead, the sonne of Machir, the sonne of Manasseh.
text.DRV: 7:17 And the son of Ulam, Badan. These are the children of Galaad, the son of Machir, the son of Manasses.

text.NRSV: And his sister Hammolecheth bore Ishhod, Abiezer, and Mahlah.
text.Rotherham: And, his sister, Hammolecheth, bare Ishhod, and Abiezer, and Mahlah.
text.KJV: 7:18 And his sister Hammoleketh bare Ishad, and Abiezer, and Mahalah.
text.DRV: 7:18 And his sister Queen bare Goodlieman, & Abiezer, & Mohola.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shemida were Ahian, Shechem, Likhi, and Aniam.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Shemida, were Ahian and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
text.KJV: 7:19 And the sonnes of Shemida were: Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
text.DRV: 7:19 And the sons of Semida were, Ahin, & Sechem, and Leci, & Anian.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah, and Bered his son, Tahath his son, Eleadah his son, Tahath his son,
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Ephraim, Shuthelah,—and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eleadah his son, and Tahath his son;
text.KJV: 7:20 ¶ And the sonnes of Ephraim: Shuthelah: and Bered his sonne, and Tahath his sonne, and Eladah his sonne, and Tahath his sonne,
text.DRV: 7:20 And the sons of Ephraim: Suthala, Bared his son, Thahath his son, Elada his son, Thahath his son, and this man's son Zabad,

text.NRSV: Zabad his son, Shuthelah his son, and Ezer and Elead. Now the people of Gath, who were born in the land, killed them, because they came down to raid their livestock.
text.Rotherham: and Zabad his son and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer and Elead,—but the men of Gath who had been born in the land slew them, because they had come down to take away their cattle.
text.KJV: 7:21 ¶ And Zabad his sonne, and Shuthelah his sonne, and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath, that were borne in that land slewe, because they came downe to take away their cattell.
text.DRV: 7:21 and this man's son Suthala, and this man's son Ezer, and Elad: and the men of Geth born in the land slew them, because they came down to invade their possessions.

text.NRSV: And their father Ephraim mourned many days, and his kindred came to comfort him.
text.Rotherham: And Ephraim their father mourned many days,—and his brethren came to comfort him.
text.KJV: 7:22 And Ephraim their father mourned many dayes, and his brethren came to comfort him.
text.DRV: 7:22 Ephraim therefore their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.

text.NRSV: Ephraim went in to his wife, and she conceived and bore a son; and he named him Beriah, because disaster had befallen his house.
text.Rotherham: And he went in unto his wife, and she conceived, and bare a son,—and he called his name, Beriah, because, in misfortune, was she in his house.
text.KJV: 7:23 ¶ And when hee went in to his wife, shee conceiued and bare a sonne, and he called his name, Beriah, because it went euill with his house.
text.DRV: 7:23 And he went in unto his wife: who conceived and bare a son, and he called his name Beria, for that he was born in the evils of his house:

text.NRSV: His daughter was Sheerah, who built both Lower and Upper Beth-horon, and Uzzen-sheerah.
text.Rotherham: And, his daughter, was Sheerah, who built Beth-horon the nether and the upper,—and Uzzen-sheerah.
text.KJV: 7:24 (And his daughter was Sherah, who built Bethoron the nether, and the vpper, and Uzzen Sherah.)
text.DRV: 7:24 and his daughter was Sara, who built Bethhoron, the nether and the upper, and Ozensara.

text.NRSV: Rephah was his son, Resheph his son, Telah his son, Tahan his son,
text.Rotherham: And Rephah his son, and Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,—
text.KJV: 7:25 And Rephah was his sonne, also Rezeph, and Telah his sonne, and Tahan his sonne,
text.DRV: 7:25 Moreover his son Rapha, and Reseph, and Thale, of whom was born Thaan,

text.NRSV: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,
text.Rotherham: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,—
text.KJV: 7:26 Laadan his sonne, Amihud his sonne, Elishama his sonne,
text.DRV: 7:26 who begat Laadan: this man's son also was Ammiud, who begat Elisama,

text.NRSV: Nun his son, Joshua his son.
text.Rotherham: Non his son, Joshua his son.
text.KJV: 7:27 Non his sonne, Iehoshua his sonne.
text.DRV: 7:27 of whom was born Nun, who had Josue his son.

text.NRSV: Their possessions and settlements were Bethel and its towns, and to the east Naaran, and to the west Gezer and its towns, Shechem and its towns, as far as Ayyah and its towns;
text.Rotherham: And, their possessions, and their dwellings, were Bethel, and the villages thereof; and, eastward, Naaran, and, westward, Gezer, and the villages thereof, and Shechem, and the villages thereof,—as far as Aiyah, and the villages thereof;—
text.KJV: 7:28 ¶ And their possessions and habitations were, Bethel, and the townes thereof, and Eastward Naaran, and Westward Gezer with the townes thereof, Shechem also and the townes thereof, vnto Gaza and the townes thereof.
text.DRV: 7:28 And their possession and habitation was Bethel with her daughters, and against the east of Noran, and on the west quarter of Gazer and her daughters, Sichem also with her daughters, as far as Asa with her daughters.

text.NRSV: also along the borders of the Manassites, Beth-shean and its towns, Taanach and its towns, Megiddo and its towns, Dor and its towns. In these lived the sons of Joseph son of Israel.
text.Rotherham: and, on the sides of the sons of Manasseh, Beth-shean and the villages thereof, Taanach and the villages thereof, Megiddo and the villages thereof, Dor and the villages thereof. In these, dwelt the sons of Joseph, son of Israel.
text.KJV: 7:29 And by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Bethshean and her townes, Taanach and her townes, Megiddo and her townes, Dor and her townes. In these dwelt the children of Ioseph the sonne of Israel.
text.DRV: 7:29 Also near the children of Manasses Bethsan & her daughters, Thanach and her daughters, Mageddo and her daughters: Dor & her daughters. In these dwelt the children of Joseph, the son of Israel.

text.NRSV: The sons of Asher: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, and their sister Serah.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Asher, Imnah, and Ishvah, and Ishvi and Beriah,—and Serah their sister.
text.KJV: 7:30 ¶ The sonnes of Asher: Imnah, and Isuah, and Ishuai, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.
text.DRV: 7:30 The children of Aser: Jemna, and Jesua, and Jessui, and Baria, and Sara their sister.

text.NRSV: The sons of Beriah: Heber and Malchiel, who was the father of Birzaith.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Beriah, Heber, and Malchiel,—the same, was the father of Birzaith.
text.KJV: 7:31 And the sonnes of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel, who is the father of Birzauith.
text.DRV: 7:31 And the sons of Baria: Heber, & Melchiel: he is the father of Barsaith.

text.NRSV: Heber became the father of Japhlet, Shomer, Hotham, and their sister Shua.
text.Rotherham: And, Heber, begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham,—and, Shua, their sister.
text.KJV: 7:32 And Heber begate Iaphlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shuah their sister.
text.DRV: 7:32 And Heber begat Jephlat, & Somer, and Hotham, & Suaa their sister.

text.NRSV: The sons of Japhlet: Pasach, Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the sons of Japhlet.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Japhlet, Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These, were the sons of Japhlet.
text.KJV: 7:33 And the sonnes of Iaphlet: Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashuath. These are the children of Iaphlet.
text.DRV: 7:33 The son of Jephlat: Phosech, & Chamaal, and Asoth: these be the sons of Jephlat.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shemer: Ahi, Rohgah, Hubbah, and Aram.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Shemer, Ahi, and Rohgah, Jahbah, and Aram.
text.KJV: 7:34 And the sonnes of Shamer: Ahi, and Rohgah, Iehubbah, and Aram.
text.DRV: 7:34 Moreover the sons of Somer: Ahi, and Roaga, and Haba, and Aram.

text.NRSV: The sons of Helem his brother: Zophah, Imna, Shelesh, and Amal.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Helem, his brother, Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh and Amal.
text.KJV: 7:35 And the sonne of his brother, Helem: Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.
text.DRV: 7:35 and the sons of Helem his brother: Supha, and Jemna, and Selles, and Amal.

text.NRSV: The sons of Zophah: Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, Imrah,
text.Rotherham: The sons of Zophah, Suah and Harnepher, and Shual and Beri, and Imrah,—
text.KJV: 7:36 The sonnes of Zophah: Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah:
text.DRV: 7:36 The sons of Supha: Sue, Harnapher, and Sual, and Beri, and Jamra,

text.NRSV: Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, and Beera.
text.Rotherham: Bezer and Hod, and Shamma and Shilshah, and Ithran and Beera.
text.KJV: 7:37 Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.
text.DRV: 7:37 Bosor, and Hod, & Samma, Salusa, & Jethran, & Bera.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jether: Jephunneh, Pispa, and Ara.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jether, Jephunneh, and Pispa, and Ara.
text.KJV: 7:38 And the sonnes of Iether: Iephunneh, and Pispa, and Ara.
text.DRV: 7:38 The sons of Jether: Jephone, and Phaspha, and Ara.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ulla: Arah, Hanniel, and Rizia.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Ulla, Arah, and Hanniel, and Rizia.
text.KJV: 7:39 And the sonnes of Ulla: Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.
text.DRV: 7:39 And the sons of Olla: Aree, and Haniel and Resia.

text.NRSV: All these were the sons of Asher, heads of ancestral houses, select mighty warriors, chief of the princes. Their number enrolled by genealogy, for service in war, was twenty-six thousand men.
text.Rotherham: All these, were sons of Asher, chiefs of the ancestral house, choice men, heroes of great valour, chiefs of the leaders,—and, when they registered themselves, in host, for war, the number of the men, was twenty-six thousand.
text.KJV: 7:40 All these were the children of Asher, heads of their fathers house, choice and mightie men of valour, chiefe of the princes. And the number throughout the genealogie of them, that were apt to the warre and to battell, was twentie and sixe thousand men.
text.DRV: 7:40 All these be the sons of Aser, Princes of their kindreds, the chosen and most valiant dukes of dukes: and their number of the age that was fit for battle, was six and twenty thousand.

text.NRSV: Benjamin became the father of Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, Aharah the third,
text.Rotherham: And, Benjamin, begat Bela his firstborn,—Ashbel, the second, and Aharah, the third,—
text.KJV: 8:1 Now Beniamin begate Bela his first borne, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,
text.DRV: 8:1 And Benjamin begat Bale his first begotten, Asbel the second, Ahara the third,

text.NRSV: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
text.Rotherham: Nohah, the fourth, and Rapha, the fifth.
text.KJV: 8:2 Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
text.DRV: 8:2 Nohaa the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

text.NRSV: And Bela had sons: Addar, Gera, Abihud,
text.Rotherham: And Bela had sons—Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,—
text.KJV: 8:3 And the sonnes of Bela were: Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,
text.DRV: 8:3 And the sons of Bale were: Addar, and Gera, and Abiud,

text.NRSV: Abishua, Naaman, Ahoah,
text.Rotherham: and Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,—
text.KJV: 8:4 And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,
text.DRV: 8:4 Abisue also, and Naaman, and Ahoe,

text.NRSV: Gera, Shephuphan, and Huram.
text.Rotherham: and Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
text.KJV: 8:5 And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.
text.DRV: 8:5 and also Gera, and Sephuphan, and Huram.

text.NRSV: These are the sons of Ehud (they were heads of ancestral houses of the inhabitants of Geba, and they were carried into exile to Manahath):
text.Rotherham: And, these, are the sons of Ehud,—these, are the ancestral chiefs to the inhabitants of Geba, but they were carried away captive, unto Manahath;
text.KJV: 8:6 And these are the sonnes of Ehud: these are the heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Geba, and they remoued them to Manahath:
text.DRV: 8:6 These are the sons of Ahod, Princes of their kindreds that dwelt in Gabaa, which were transported into Manahath.

text.NRSV: Naaman, Ahijah, and Gera, that is, Heglam, who became the father of Uzza and Ahihud.
text.Rotherham: and, as for Naaman and Ahijah and Gera, the same, carried them captive,—and he begat Uzza and Ahihud.
text.KJV: 8:7 And Naaman, and Ahiah, and Gera, he remooued them, and begate Uzza, and Ahihud.
text.DRV: 8:7 And Naaman, and Achia, and Gera he transported them, and begat Oza, and Ahiud.

text.NRSV: And Shaharaim had sons in the country of Moab after he had sent away his wives Hushim and Baara.
text.Rotherham: And, Shaharaim, begat children in the field of Moab, after he had sent away Hushim and Baara his wives.
text.KJV: 8:8 And Shaharaim begate children in the countrey of Moab. After hee had sent them away: Hushim, and Baara were his wiues.
text.DRV: 8:8 Moreover he begat Saharaim in the country of Moab, after he dismissed Husim and Bara his wives.

text.NRSV: He had sons by his wife Hodesh: Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcam,
text.Rotherham: Then begat he, of Hodesh his wife,—Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcam;
text.KJV: 8:9 And he begat of Hodesh his wife, Iobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,
text.DRV: 8:9 And of Hodes his wife he begat Jobab, and Sebia, and Mosa, and Molchom,

text.NRSV: Jeuz, Sachia, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of ancestral houses.
text.Rotherham: and Jeuz, and Sachia, and Mirmah,—these, were his sons, ancestral chiefs.
text.KJV: 8:10 And Ieuz, and Shachia, and Mirma. These were his sonnes, heads of the fathers.
text.DRV: 8:10 Jehus also, and Sechia, and Marma. These are his sons Princes in their families.

text.NRSV: He also had sons by Hushim: Abitub and Elpaal.
text.Rotherham: And, of Hushim, he begat Abitub, and Elpaal.
text.KJV: 8:11 And of Hushim he begate Ahitub, and Elpaal.
text.DRV: 8:11 And Mehusim begat Abitob, and Elphaal.

text.NRSV: The sons of Elpaal: Eber, Misham, and Shemed, who built Ono and Lod with its towns,
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Elpaal, Eber, and Misham, and Shemed,—he, built Ono, and Lod, and the villages thereof.
text.KJV: 8:12 The sonnes of Elpaal: Eber, and Misham, & Shamed, who built Ono, and Lod with the townes thereof.
text.DRV: 8:12 Moreover the sons of Elphaal Heber, and Misaam, and Samad: this man built Ono, and Lod, and her daughters.

text.NRSV: and Beriah and Shema (they were heads of ancestral houses of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who put to flight the inhabitants of Gath);
text.Rotherham: And, as for Beriah and Shema, they, were ancestral chiefs to the inhabitants of Aijalon,—they, put to flight the inhabitants of Gath;
text.KJV: 8:13 Beriah also and Shema, who were heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Aialon, who droue away the inhabitants of Gath.
text.DRV: 8:13 And Baria, and Sama Princes of their kindreds that dwelt in Aialon: these drove away the inhabitants of Geth.

text.NRSV: and Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth.
text.Rotherham: and Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,—
text.KJV: 8:14 And Ahio, Shashak, and Ierimoth,
text.DRV: 8:14 And Ahio, & Sesac, and Jerimoth,

text.NRSV: Zebadiah, Arad, Eder,
text.Rotherham: and Zebadiah, and Arad, and Eder,—
text.KJV: 8:15 And Zebadiah, & Arad, & Ader,
text.DRV: 8:15 and Sabadia, and Arod, and Heder,

text.NRSV: Michael, Ishpah, and Joha were sons of Beriah.
text.Rotherham: and Michael, and Ishpah, and Joha, sons of Beriah,—
text.KJV: 8:16 And Michael, and Ispah, and Ioha the sonnes of Beriah,
text.DRV: 8:16 Michael also, and Jespha, & Joha the sons of Baria.

text.NRSV: Zebadiah, Meshullam, Hizki, Heber,
text.Rotherham: and Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hizki, and Heber,—
text.KJV: 8:17 And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,
text.DRV: 8:17 And Zabadia, and Mosollam, and Hezeci, and Heber,

text.NRSV: Ishmerai, Izliah, and Jobab were sons of Elpaal.
text.Rotherham: and Ishmerai, and Izliah, and Jobab, sons of Elpaal,—
text.KJV: 8:18 Ishmerai also, and Iezliah, and Iobab the sonnes of Elpaal.
text.DRV: 8:18 and Jesamari, and Jezlia, and Jobab sons of Elphaal,

text.NRSV: Jakim, Zichri, Zabdi,
text.Rotherham: and Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi—
text.KJV: 8:19 And Iakim, and Zichri, & Zabdi,
text.DRV: 8:19 and Jacim, and Zechri, and Zabdi

text.NRSV: Elienai, Zillethai, Eliel,
text.Rotherham: and Elienai, and Zillethai, and Eliel,—
text.KJV: 8:20 And Elienai, and Zilthai, & Eliel,
text.DRV: 8:20 and Elioenai, and Selethai, and Eliel,

text.NRSV: Adaiah, Beraiah, and Shimrath were sons of Shimei.
text.Rotherham: and Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, sons of Shimei,—
text.KJV: 8:21 And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sonnes of Shimhi,
text.DRV: 8:21 and Adaia, and Baraia, and Samarath the sons of Semei.

text.NRSV: Ishpan, Eber, Eliel,
text.Rotherham: and Ishpan, and Eber, and Eliel,—
text.KJV: 8:22 And Ishpan, and Heber, & Eliel,
text.DRV: 8:22 And Jespham, and Heber, and Eliel.

text.NRSV: Abdon, Zichri, Hanan,
text.Rotherham: and Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,—
text.KJV: 8:23 And Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,
text.DRV: 8:23 and Abdon, and Zechri, and Hanan,

text.NRSV: Hananiah, Elam, Anthothijah,
text.Rotherham: and Hananiah, and Elam, and Anthothijah,—
text.KJV: 8:24 And Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothiiah,
text.DRV: 8:24 and Hanania, and Ælam, and Anathothia,

text.NRSV: Iphdeiah, and Penuel were sons of Shashak.
text.Rotherham: and Iphdeiah, and Penuel, sons of Shashak,—
text.KJV: 8:25 And Iphedeiah, and Penuel, the sonnes of Shashak,
text.DRV: 8:25 and Jephdaia, and Phanuel the sons of Sesac.

text.NRSV: Shamsherai, Shehariah, Athaliah,
text.Rotherham: and Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,—
text.KJV: 8:26 And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,
text.DRV: 8:26 and Samsari, and Sohoria and Otholia.

text.NRSV: Jaareshiah, Elijah, and Zichri were sons of Jeroham.
text.Rotherham: and Jaareshiah, and Elijah, and Zichri, sons of Jeroham:
text.KJV: 8:27 And Iaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri the sonnes of Ieroham.
text.DRV: 8:27 and Jersia, and Elia, and Zechri, the sons of Jeroham.

text.NRSV: These were heads of ancestral houses, according to their generations, chiefs. These lived in Jerusalem.
text.Rotherham: these, were ancestral chiefs to their generations, chief men,—these, dwelt in Jerusalem;
text.KJV: 8:28 These were heads of the fathers, by their generations, chiefe men. These dwelt in Ierusalem.
text.DRV: 8:28 these be the Patriarchs, and Princes of their kindreds, which dwelt in Jerusalem.

text.NRSV: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon, and the name of his wife was Maacah.
text.Rotherham: And, in Gibeon, dwelt the father of Gibeon [Jeiel], the name of whose wife, was Maacah,—
text.KJV: 8:29 And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon, (whose wiues name was Maachah:)
text.DRV: 8:29 And in Gabaon dwelt Abigabaon, and the name of his wife Maacha:

text.NRSV: His firstborn son: Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab,
text.Rotherham: and his firstborn son, Abdon, and Zur and Kish, and Baal and Ner and Nadab,—
text.KJV: 8:30 And his first borne sonne Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, & Nadab,
text.DRV: 8:30 And his first-begotten son Abdon, and Sur, and Cis, and Baal, and Nadab.

text.NRSV: Gedor, Ahio, Zecher,
text.Rotherham: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zecher.
text.KJV: 8:31 And Gidor, & Ahio, and Zacher,
text.DRV: 8:31 Gedor also, and Ahio, and Zacher, and Macelloth:

text.NRSV: and Mikloth, who became the father of Shimeah. Now these also lived opposite their kindred in Jerusalem, with their kindred.
text.Rotherham: And, Mikloth, begat Shimeah,—moreover also, they, over against their brethren, did dwell in Jerusalem, with their own brethren.
text.KJV: 8:32 And Mikloth begate Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Ierusalem, ouer against them.
text.DRV: 8:32 and Macelloth begat Samaa: and they dwelt over against their brethren in Jerusalem with their brethren.

text.NRSV: Ner became the father of Kish, Kish became the father of Saul, Saul became the father of Jonathan, Malchi-shua, Abinadab, and Esh-baal;
text.Rotherham: So then, Ner, begat Kish, and, Kish, begat Saul,—and, Saul, begat Jonathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.
text.KJV: 8:33 ¶ And Ner begate Kish, and Kish begate Saul, and Saul begate Ionathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.
text.DRV: 8:33 And Ner begat Cis, and Cis begat Saul. Moreover Saul begat Jonathas, and Melchisua, and Abinadab, and Esbaal.

text.NRSV: and the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal became the father of Micah.
text.Rotherham: And, the son of Jonathan, was Merib-baal,—and, Merib-baal, begat Micah.
text.KJV: 8:34 And the sonne of Ionathan was Meribbaal, and Meribbaal begate Micah.
text.DRV: 8:34 And the son of Jonathas, Meribbaal: and Meribbaal begat Micha.

text.NRSV: The sons of Micah: Pithon, Melech, Tarea, and Ahaz.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Micah, were Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.
text.KJV: 8:35 And the sonnes of Micah were Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.
text.DRV: 8:35 The sons of Micha, Phithon, and Melech, and Tharaa, and Ahaz.

text.NRSV: Ahaz became the father of Jehoaddah; and Jehoaddah became the father of Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri; Zimri became the father of Moza.
text.Rotherham: And, Ahaz, begat Jehoaddah, and, Jehoaddah, begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri,—and, Zimri, begat Moza;
text.KJV: 8:36 And Ahaz begat Iehoadah, and Iehoadah begate Alemeth, and Asmaueth, and Zimri, and Zimri begate Moza,
text.DRV: 8:36 And Ahaz begat Joada and Joada begat Alamath, and Azmoth, and Zamri: moreover Zamri begat Mosa,

text.NRSV: Moza became the father of Binea; Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
text.Rotherham: and, Moza, begat Binea,—Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
text.KJV: 8:37 And Moza begate Binea: Rapha was his sonne, Elasa his sonne, Azel his sonne:
text.DRV: 8:37 and Mosa begat Banaa, whose son was Rapha, of whom was born Elasa, who begat Asel.

text.NRSV: Azel had six sons, and these are their names: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.
text.Rotherham: And, Azel, had six sons, and, these, were their names—Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obediah, and Hanan and Asah,—all these, were sons of Azel.
text.KJV: 8:38 And Azel had sixe sonnes, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sonnes of Azel.
text.DRV: 8:38 Moreover Asel had six sons of these names, Ezricam, Bochru, Ismahel, Saria, Obdia, and Hanan. All these the sons of Asel.

text.NRSV: The sons of Eshek his brother: Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Eshek his brother, were Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
text.KJV: 8:39 And the sonnes of Eshek his brother were Ulam his first-borne, Iehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
text.DRV: 8:39 And the sons of Esec his brother, Ulam the first-begotten, and Jehus the second, and Eliphalet the third.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ulam were mighty warriors, strong archers, having many sons and grandsons, one hundred fifty. All these were Benjaminites.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Ulam became men that were heroes of valour, archers, with many sons, and sons’ sons, a hundred and fifty. All these, were of the sons of Benjamin.
text.KJV: 8:40 And the sonnes of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sonnes, and sonnes sonnes, an hundred and fiftie. All these are of the sonnes of Beniamin.
text.DRV: 8:40 And the sons of Ulam were most strong men, and archers of great force: and having many sons and nephews, unto an hundred fifty. All these the children of Benjamin.

text.NRSV: So all Israel was enrolled by genealogies; and these are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel. And Judah was taken into exile in Babylon because of their unfaithfulness.
text.Rotherham: And, all Israel, registered themselves, and lo! they are written, in the Book of the Kings of Israel, and, Judah, was carried away captive to Babylon, for their faithlessness.
text.KJV: 9:1 So all Israel were reckoned by genealogies, & behold, they were written in the booke of the Kings of Israel and Iudah, who were caried away to Babylon for their transgression.
text.DRV: 9:1 All Israel therefore was numbered: and the sum of them was written in the Book of the kings of Israel & Juda and they were transported into Babylon for their sin.

text.NRSV: Now the first to live again in their possessions in their towns were Israelites, priests, Levites, and temple servants.
text.Rotherham: Now, the first inhabitants, who were in their possessions, in their cities, were Israel, the priests, the Levites, and the Nethinim.
text.KJV: 9:2 ¶ Now the first inhabitants that dwelt in their possessions, in their cities, were the Israelites, the Priests, Leuits, and the Nethinims.
text.DRV: 9:2 And they that dwelt first in their possessions and in their cities: Israel, and the Priests, and the Levites, and the Nathineans.

text.NRSV: And some of the people of Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh lived in Jerusalem:
text.Rotherham: And, in Jerusalem, there dwelt, of the sons of Judah, and of the sons of Benjamin,—and of the sons of Ephraim, and Manasseh:
text.KJV: 9:3 And in Ierusalem dwelt of the children of Iudah, and of the children of Beniamin, and of the children of Ephraim, and Manasseh.
text.DRV: 9:3 There dwelt in Jerusalem of the children of Juda, and of the children of Benjamin, also of the children of Ephraim, and Manasses.

text.NRSV: Uthai son of Ammihud, son of Omri, son of Imri, son of Bani, from the sons of Perez son of Judah.
text.Rotherham: Uthai son of Ammihud, son of Omri, son of Imri, son of Bani, of the sons of Perez, son of Judah.
text.KJV: 9:4 Uthai the sonne of Amihud, the sonne of Omri, the sonne of Imri, the sonne of Bani, of the children of Pharez the sonne of Iudah.
text.DRV: 9:4 Othei the son of Ammiud, the son of Amri, the son of Omrai, the son of Bonni, of the sons of Phares the son of Juda.

text.NRSV: And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.
text.Rotherham: And, of the Shilonites, Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.
text.KJV: 9:5 And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the first borne, and his sonnes.
text.DRV: 9:5 And of Siloni: Asaia the first-begotten, and his sons.

text.NRSV: Of the sons of Zerah: Jeuel and their kindred, six hundred ninety.
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Zerah, Jeuel,—and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.
text.KJV: 9:6 And of the sonnes of Zerah: Ieuel, and their brethren, sixe hundred and ninetie.
text.DRV: 9:6 And of the sons of Zara: Jehuel, and their brethren, six hundred ninety.

text.NRSV: Of the Benjaminites: Sallu son of Meshullam, son of Hodaviah, son of Hassenuah,
text.Rotherham: And, of the sons of Benjamin, Sallu, son of Meshullam, son of Hodaviah, son of Hassenuah;
text.KJV: 9:7 And of the sonnes of Beniamin: Sallu the sonne of Meshullam, the sonne of Hodauiah, the sonne of Hasenuah:
text.DRV: 9:7 Moreover of the sons of Benjamin: Salo the son of Mosollam, the son of Oduia the son of Asana:

text.NRSV: Ibneiah son of Jeroham, Elah son of Uzzi, son of Michri, and Meshullam son of Shephatiah, son of Reuel, son of Ibnijah;
text.Rotherham: and Ibneiah, son of Jeroham, and Elah, son of Uzzi, son of Michri,—and Meshullam, son of Shephatiah, son of Reuel, son of Ibnijah;
text.KJV: 9:8 And Ibneiah the sonne of Ieroham, and Elah the sonne of Uzzi, the sonne of Michri, and Meshullam the sonne of Shephatiah, the sonne of Reuel, the sonne of Ibniiah,
text.DRV: 9:8 and Jobania the son of Jeroham: and Ela the son of Ozi the son of Mochori: and Mosollam the son of Saphatias, the son of Rahuel, the son of Jebania,

text.NRSV: and their kindred according to their generations, nine hundred fifty-six. All these were heads of families according to their ancestral houses.
text.Rotherham: and their brethren, by their generations, nine hundred and fifty-six,—all these men, were ancestral chiefs, to their ancestral house.
text.KJV: 9:9 And their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fiftie and sixe. All these men were chiefe of the fathers in the house of their fathers.
text.DRV: 9:9 and their brethren by their families, nine hundred fifty six. All these Princes of their kindreds by the houses of their fathers.

text.NRSV: Of the priests: Jedaiah, Jehoiarib, Jachin,
text.Rotherham: And, of the priests, Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,—
text.KJV: 9:10 ¶ And of the Priests: Iedaiah, and Iehoiarib, and Iachin,
text.DRV: 9:10 And of the Priests: Jedaia, Joiarib, and Jachin:

text.NRSV: and Azariah son of Hilkiah, son of Meshullam, son of Zadok, son of Meraioth, son of Ahitub, the chief officer of the house of God;
text.Rotherham: and Azariah son of Hilkiah, son of Meshullam, son of Zadok, son of Meraioth, son of Ahitub, chief ruler of the house of God;
text.KJV: 9:11 And Azariah the sonne of Hilkiah, the sonne of Meshullam, the sonne of Zadok, the sonne of Meraioth, the sonne of Ahitub the ruler of the house of God.
text.DRV: 9:11 Azarias also the son of Helcias, the son of Mosollam, the son of Sadoc, the son of Maraioth, the son of Achitob, high Priest of the house of God.

text.NRSV: and Adaiah son of Jeroham, son of Pashhur, son of Malchijah, and Maasai son of Adiel, son of Jahzerah, son of Meshullam, son of Meshillemith, son of Immer;
